entry.title: Mod Settings (RitsuLib)
entry.subtitle: Edit mod options exposed to players.
baselib.mirroredPage.title: Mod config
baselib.mirroredPage.description: This page mirrors BaseLib-generated mod configuration entries.
ritsulib.page.title: Settings
ritsulib.page.description: Framework settings and settings UI reference entries.
ritsulib.section.general.title: General
ritsulib.section.general.description: Persisted framework settings exposed to players.
ritsulib.section.appearance.title: Appearance
ritsulib.section.appearance.description: Visual theme for the Ritsu mod settings interface.
ritsulib.uiShellTheme.label: Interface theme
ritsulib.uiShellTheme.description: Applies a built-in color theme to the Ritsu settings UI shell (sidebars, rows, and modals).
ritsulib.uiShellTheme.resetFile.label: Reset existing theme files
ritsulib.uiShellTheme.resetFile.descript: Overwrite existing built-in theme files on disk with their embedded default versions.
ritsulib.section.steamCloudModData.title: Steam Cloud (mod data)
ritsulib.section.steamCloudModData.descr: Manage syncing mod data with Steam Cloud here.
ritsulib.syncModDataSteamCloud.label: Sync mod data to Steam Cloud
ritsulib.syncModDataSteamCloud.descripti: When Steam Cloud is active, syncs mod data after saves and on profile load. Off keeps it local-only.
ritsulib.modCloud.pushNow.label: Upload to Steam now
ritsulib.modCloud.pushNow.description: Uploads local mod data, overwriting the cloud copy.
ritsulib.modCloud.pullNow.label: Download from Steam now
ritsulib.modCloud.pullNow.description: Downloads mod data from the cloud over the local copy, then reloads from disk.
ritsulib.modCloud.clear.label: Clear mod data from Steam Cloud
ritsulib.modCloud.clear.description: Deletes mod data from Steam Cloud for this profile. Local files are not removed. Requires confirmation.
ritsulib.modCloud.clear.confirm.title: Delete mod data from Steam Cloud?
ritsulib.modCloud.clear.confirm.body: Removes mod data from Steam Cloud only. Local files stay. Other profiles are not affected.
ritsulib.modCloud.clear.confirmScopeBody: Scope: {0}. Remote copies only; local files stay. Other profiles are not affected.
ritsulib.modCloud.clearDone: Removed {0} file(s) from Steam Cloud. Failures: {1}.
ritsulib.modCloud.prompt.title: Mod data (Steam Cloud)
ritsulib.modCloud.unavailableSteam: Steam is not active. Run the game through Steam with cloud saves enabled.
ritsulib.modCloud.unavailableStore: Steam Cloud is not active for this session (same requirement as vanilla cloud saves).
ritsulib.modCloud.pushDone: Queued {0} file(s) for Steam Cloud upload.
ritsulib.modCloud.pushPartial: Queued {0} file(s) for upload; {1} failed. See game log for details.
ritsulib.modCloud.pushSummary: Queued for upload: {0}. Skipped (no local file): {1}. Failed: {2}.
ritsulib.modCloud.pullDone: Downloaded {0} file(s) from Steam Cloud. Mod data was reloaded from disk.
ritsulib.modCloud.pullPartial: Downloaded {0} file(s); {1} failed. See game log for details.
ritsulib.modCloud.busy: Another mod cloud operation is already running.
ritsulib.modCloud.noSceneTree: Cannot start: game scene tree is not available.
ritsulib.modCloud.scope.pushBody: Which mod data should be uploaded?
ritsulib.modCloud.scope.pullBody: Which mod data should be downloaded?
ritsulib.modCloud.scope.clearBody: Which mod data should be removed from the cloud? Local files are not deleted.
ritsulib.debugCompatibility.label: Debug compatibility mode
ritsulib.debugCompatibility.description: Enable compatibility fallbacks for localization, unlock, and Ancient dialogue edge cases. Per-feature toggles default to on.
ritsulib.section.debugCompatShims.title: Compatibility fallbacks
ritsulib.section.debugCompatShims.descri: Shown only when debug compatibility mode is enabled. Each toggle controls one compatibility fallback.
ritsulib.debugCompatLocTable.label: LocTable missing keys
ritsulib.debugCompatLocTable.description: Resolve missing keys to placeholder LocString values and log one [Localization][DebugCompat] warning per key.
ritsulib.debugCompatUnlockEpoch.label: Invalid unlock epochs
ritsulib.debugCompatUnlockEpoch.descript: Skip invalid epoch grants on RitsuLib-registered unlock paths and log one [Unlocks][DebugCompat] warning per stable key.
ritsulib.debugCompatAncientArchitect.des: Inject empty Lines entries for ModContentRegistry ancients when vanilla provides no dialogue.
ritsulib.section.devDebugTools.title: Developer debug tools
ritsulib.section.harmonyDump.title: Harmony patch dump
ritsulib.section.harmonyDump.description: Export a text report of patched methods (prefix/postfix/transpiler/finalizer) for debugging mod interactions.
ritsulib.section.selfCheck.title: Self-check mode
ritsulib.section.selfCheck.description: Run a self-check and export diagnostics as a zip package.
ritsulib.harmonyDump.path.label: Output file path
ritsulib.harmonyDump.path.description: Where to write the patch report. Use Browse to pick a file, or type a full path or Godot user:// path.
ritsulib.harmonyDump.auto.label: Dump when main menu first loads
ritsulib.harmonyDump.auto.description: Once per game session, after the main menu finishes loading, write the report if the output path is set.
ritsulib.harmonyDump.browse.label: Choose output file
ritsulib.harmonyDump.browse.hint: Opens a save dialog and fills the output path above.
ritsulib.harmonyDump.now.label: Write dump now
ritsulib.harmonyDump.now.description: Export the patch report immediately using the current output path. A success or failure prompt is shown after completion.
ritsulib.harmonyDump.prompt.title: Harmony patch dump
ritsulib.harmonyDump.prompt.invalidPath: Export did not run: output path is empty or invalid. Configure a valid path first.
ritsulib.page.harmonyDump.title: Harmony patch dump
ritsulib.page.harmonyDump.description: Export a text report of patched methods (prefix/postfix/transpiler/finalizer) for debugging mod interactions.
ritsulib.page.selfCheck.title: Self-check mode
ritsulib.page.selfCheck.description: Run a quick self-check and export all diagnostics in one package.
ritsulib.selfCheck.path.label: Output folder
ritsulib.selfCheck.path.description: Choose where self-check exports are saved.
ritsulib.selfCheck.auto.label: Run once when main menu first loads
ritsulib.selfCheck.auto.description: Automatically runs one self-check export per game session after the first main menu load.
ritsulib.selfCheck.browse.label: Choose output folder
ritsulib.selfCheck.browse.hint: Opens a folder picker and fills the output folder above.
ritsulib.selfCheck.openFolder.label: Open output folder
ritsulib.selfCheck.openFolder.hint: Opens the configured output folder in your system file explorer.
ritsulib.selfCheck.runNow.label: Run self-check now
ritsulib.selfCheck.runNow.description: Run self-check now and export a zip package.
ritsulib.selfCheck.prompt.title: RitsuLib self-check
ritsulib.selfCheck.prompt.invalidPath: Self-check did not run: output folder is empty or invalid. Configure a valid path first.
ritsulib.page.imagePngExport.title: Image PNG export (dev)
ritsulib.page.imagePngExport.description: Batch export for library cards, relic inspection popups, and potion lab focus panels (detail content: unlocked / seen; no save gating).
ritsulib.section.imagePngExport.title: Image PNG export (dev)
ritsulib.section.imagePngExport.descript: Card, relic, and potion image exports.
ritsulib.cardPngExport.progress.title: Exporting card images…
ritsulib.section.cardPngExport.title: Card PNG export (dev)
ritsulib.cardPngExport.path.label: Output folder
ritsulib.cardPngExport.browse.label: Choose output folder
ritsulib.cardPngExport.hover.label: Include hover-tip panel
ritsulib.cardPngExport.upgrades.label: Export upgraded variants
ritsulib.cardPngExport.hidden.label: Include non-library cards
ritsulib.cardPngExport.scale.label: Render scale
ritsulib.cardPngExport.filter.label: Card id contains (optional)
ritsulib.cardPngExport.start.label: Start export
ritsulib.relicDetailPngExport.path.label: Output folder
ritsulib.relicDetailPngExport.browseTitl: Choose relic detail PNG export folder
ritsulib.potionDetailPngExport.browseTit: Choose potion detail PNG export folder
ritsulib.compendiumPngExport.progress.ti: Exporting relic and potion detail images…
ritsulib.relicDetailPngExport.includeHov: When true, export layout includes a right-hand hover-tip style column.
ritsulib.section.reference.title: Reference
ritsulib.section.reference.description: Reference controls available in the settings UI.
ritsulib.reference.intro: Open the control preview page to inspect available controls and layout behavior.
ritsulib.reference.gallery.label: Control preview
ritsulib.reference.gallery.description: Reference page only. Values on this page are not saved.
ritsulib.reference.runtimeHotkeys.label: Registered hotkeys
ritsulib.reference.runtimeHotkeys.descri: Inspect currently registered runtime hotkeys and their active bindings.
ritsulib.section.hostSurfaceReference.de: Shows how sections can be shown, hidden, or read-only by host surface.
ritsulib.hostSurface.intro: Pages and sections can be limited to certain menus, or read-only in some of them.
ritsulib.hostSurface.tiers: Typical split: global aids everywhere; sensitive values read-only in combat; debug-only rows only in combat pause.
ritsulib.hostSurface.demoToggle.label: Read-only in combat pause (demo)
ritsulib.hostSurface.demoToggle.descript: Editable on the main menu and run pause; locked while paused in a fight.
ritsulib.hostSurface.combatOnly.body: Shown only when mod settings are opened from a mid-combat pause.
ritsulib.page.runtimeHotkeys.title: Registered hotkeys
ritsulib.page.runtimeHotkeys.description: Inspect currently registered runtime hotkeys and their active bindings.
ritsulib.section.runtimeHotkeys.title: Runtime hotkeys
ritsulib.section.runtimeHotkeys.descript: Lists active runtime hotkey registrations grouped by category.
ritsulib.runtimeHotkeys.empty: No runtime hotkeys are currently registered.
ritsulib.runtimeHotkeys.groups.descripti: Each entry shows the current binding, display name, optional description, and registration id.
ritsulib.showcase.title: Control Preview
ritsulib.showcase.description: Demonstrates supported controls and dynamic descriptions without persisting values.
ritsulib.showcase.overview.title: Overview
ritsulib.showcase.header.description: Reference controls backed by preview-only bindings.
ritsulib.showcase.summary: Toggle: {0} | Double: {1:0.##} | Int: {2} | Choice: {3} | Dropdown: {4} | Mode: {5} | Action Count: {6}
ritsulib.showcase.image.label: Reference image
ritsulib.showcase.image.description: Image previews can participate in dynamic descriptions. Current mode: {0}
ritsulib.showcase.inputs.title: Inputs
ritsulib.showcase.inputs.description: Editing these controls updates the preview state only.
ritsulib.showcase.toggle.label: Preview toggle
ritsulib.showcase.slider.label: Preview slider
ritsulib.showcase.intSlider.label: Preview integer slider
ritsulib.showcase.choice.label: Preview choice
ritsulib.showcase.choiceDropdown.label: Preview choice (dropdown)
ritsulib.showcase.choiceDropdown.descrip: Stress-test dropdown with 1000 dynamically generated options (virtualized list). Current: {0}
ritsulib.showcase.mode.label: Preview enum choice
ritsulib.showcase.string.label: Preview string field
ritsulib.showcase.stringMulti.label: Preview multiline field
ritsulib.showcase.stringMulti.placeholde: Multiple lines — Enter inserts a new line.
ritsulib.showcase.actions.title: Commands
ritsulib.showcase.actions.description: Buttons can mutate preview state and refresh adjacent descriptions.
ritsulib.showcase.action.label: Preview command
ritsulib.showcase.reset.label: Reset preview bindings
ritsulib.showcase.reset.description: Restore all preview bindings to default values without persisting data.
ritsulib.showcase.list.title: Structured List
ritsulib.showcase.list.description: Structured collections can be edited, reordered, added, and removed inside the settings UI.
ritsulib.showcase.list.label: Preview structured collection
ritsulib.showcase.footer: Use this page as a reference when implementing settings pages.
sidebar.title: Mods
sidebar.subtitle: Browse registered mods, pages, and sections.
choice.dropdown.tooltip: Opens a list to choose a value. Current: {0}
choice.dropdown.currentRow: Active option shown by the collapsed control.
empty.none: No mod settings pages are currently registered.
empty.mod: This mod has no registered settings page.
color.title: Color Editor
keybinding.hint.combo: Click to record. Supports key combinations.
keybinding.hint.comboNonModifier: Click to record. Supports key combinations and requires a non-modifier key.
keybinding.hint.single: Click to record a single key.
keybinding.hint.capturing: Press a key combination. Esc cancels, Backspace/Delete clears.
keybinding.hint.capturingPending: Modifier keys recorded. Press another key to complete, or release to keep a modifier-only binding.
ritsulib.keybindingMulti.hint: Add one or more bindings. Use Rebind on a row to replace just that binding.
ritsulib.keybindingMulti.capturing: Press a key combination to add. Esc cancels, Backspace/Delete clears all.
ritsulib.showcase.hotkey.label: Preview key binding
ritsulib.showcase.hotkeyMulti.label: Preview multi key binding
ritsulib.showcase.hotkeyMulti.descriptio: Explicit opt-in native multi-binding key capture preview.
ritsulib.showcase.toast.label: Toast preview
ritsulib.showcase.toast.title: Toast preview
ritsulib.showcase.toast.body: Queue and layout test entry from the control preview page. Count: {0}.
ritsulib.showcase.toast.bodyChunk: Overflow probe sentence for wrapping and height checks.
ritsulib.showcase.toast.description: Shows a themed toast with randomized text length and optional image.
ritsulib.showcase.list.field.name: Name
ritsulib.showcase.details.title: Detail Notes
ritsulib.showcase.details.description: Nested structured list editor for each item.
ritsulib.showcase.details.field.label: Label
clipboard.pasteFailedBlocked: Paste was blocked by a custom rule.
clipboard.pasteFailedIncompatible: Clipboard contents are not compatible with this setting.
ritsulib.section.toast.title: Toast notifications
ritsulib.section.toast.description: Configure stack placement, queue limits, and animation for global toast notifications.
ritsulib.toast.enabled.label: Enable toast notifications
ritsulib.toast.enabled.description: Global switch for non-blocking toast notifications.
ritsulib.toast.anchor.label: Toast position
ritsulib.toast.anchorOffset.guide: Anchor picks where the newest toast starts. Offsets shift that anchor in screen pixels before viewport clamping.
ritsulib.toast.anchor.description: Select where the newest toast is anchored before stack expansion.
ritsulib.toast.offsetX.label: Horizontal offset
ritsulib.toast.offsetX.description: Shift the anchor on X before clamping. Negative moves left, positive moves right.
ritsulib.toast.offsetY.label: Vertical offset
ritsulib.toast.offsetY.description: Shift the anchor on Y before clamping. Negative moves up, positive moves down.
ritsulib.toast.maxVisible.label: Max visible toasts
ritsulib.toast.maxVisible.description: Maximum toasts shown at once. Extra items queue and appear in order.
ritsulib.toast.duration.label: Default duration (seconds)
ritsulib.toast.duration.description: Default display duration for toasts without per-request overrides.
ritsulib.toast.animation.label: Animation preset
ritsulib.toast.animation.description: Applies to enter/exit animation of new toasts.
ritsulib.runtimeReflection.spine.page.de: Try bindings and a simple spine preview.
ritsulib.runtimeReflection.spine.section: Pick a character and an animation.
ritsulib.runtimeReflection.spine.entry.d: Built-in character visuals in a small viewport.
ritsulib.runtimeReflection.spine.binding: Change the value, then use Save below to store the snapshot.
Live value vs last saved snapshot.
Stores the current value as the saved snapshot.
